title: Apple iPhone 18 Pro Max Trends in Argentina
description: Recent reports discuss differences, pricing leaks, and innovations regarding the Apple iPhone 18 Pro Max.

sources.title: Las principales diferencias del iPhone 18 con los modelos anteriores
Filtración bomba de Apple: revelan cuánto costaría el iPhone 18 Pro Max y la cifra genera polémica
Las 3 innovaciones que tendría el próximo iPhone 18 Pro

sections.heading: Device Comparisons
paragraphs: Canal 12 Web published an article detailing the main differences of the iPhone 18 compared to previous models.

sections.heading: Pricing Reports
paragraphs: Diario UNO reported on a leak revealing the potential cost of the iPhone 18 Pro Max. The source noted that the reported price figure generated controversy.

sections.heading: Expected Features
paragraphs: MDZ Online discussed three specific innovations that are expected to be included in the upcoming iPhone 18 Pro.

sections.heading: Search Data
paragraphs: According to the trend data, the search term 'apple iphone 18 pro max' had a reported search lower bound of 500 in the AR region. The snapshot for this data was taken in late July 2026.

faq.q: What sources covered the iPhone 18 Pro Max?
faq.a: Canal 12 Web, Diario UNO, and MDZ Online provided coverage regarding the device.

faq.q: Was the price of the iPhone 18 Pro Max discussed?
faq.a: Yes, Diario UNO reported on a leak regarding the cost of the iPhone 18 Pro Max, stating the figure caused controversy.
MDZ Online reported on three innovations expected for the next iPhone 18 Pro.
